This exciting buildup promises thrilling action as both competitors prepare for their championship showdown.

results.title: Rare 'crusted scabies' outbreak forces closure of hospital ward in Wales
results.description: A hospital ward in Carmarthen in Wales has been closed following an outbreak of crusted scabies - a rare and highly contagious form of the illness. Hywel Dda health board said a ward at Glangwili Hospital would be closed to manage the outbreak. The board said all patients and staff identified as contacts had been informed and offered treatment. Crusted scabies, previously known as Norwegian scabies, is caused by mites. The main symptom includes a scaly rash and thickened crusts of skin. Hywel Dda health board said extra infection prevention and control measures are being done at the ward. The board said there has been a rise in scabies in the areas under its coverage - Carmarthenshire, Pembrokeshire and Ceredigion. The ward will reopen when it is safe to do so, it added. Scabies should be treated quickly to stop its spread. According to the NHS , scabies can spread through close skin contact and anyone can get it. It often affects skin between the fingers, around the wrists, under the arms and around the waist, groin and bottom.

results.title: Vietnam Enhances Pickleball Rankings with Global Rating System
results.description: Vietnam is making strides in the world of pickleball by partnering with the Dynamic Universal Pickleball Rating (DUPR) to enhance its player ranking system. This collaboration will allow local players to earn globally recognized ratings from domestic competitions, facilitating their participation in international tournaments. As Vietnam establishes itself as a leading pickleball market in Asia, this initiative promises to streamline the ranking process and connect its players with the global competitive landscape. Discover how this partnership is set to transform the sport in Vietnam.

results.title: A Devil's Bargain Foretold
results.description: Praful Bidwai’s 2015 Kashmir Times column, republished as an archival note, dissects why a PDP-BJP alliance in Jammu and Kashmir was structurally doomed from inception. He argues that the “grand embrace” would deepen communal polarisation, erode the PDP’s Valley-centric identity, and hand Narendra Modi a cost-free strategic victory. Bidwai details the sharply divergent electoral mandates, ideological incompatibilities over Article 370, AFSPA and Pakistan, and warns that Kashmiris would see such a coalition as capitulation to a hostile Hindutva project. In retrospect, his predictions about the PDP’s rout, abrogation of special status and loss of statehood read like a chillingly accurate document of record.

results.title: Leader vows to avenge martyr Ayatollah Khamenei’s blood
results.description: Tehran, IRNA – Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei has pledged to avenge the killing of Martyr Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei after thanking people for their massive participation in the funeral procession and burial ceremony of the martyred Leader last week.
